title: Rexel Choices A4 Lever Arch Files, 3-Pack Assorted Colors (Black, Red, Blue), Durable Plastic on Board, Patented No.1 Locking Mechanism, Replaceable Spine Labels, Ring Binder, Office File Organizer
features: Durable Construction for Long-Term Use: Made with a sturdy plastic cover over strong board, these lever arch files ensure maximum durability for lever arch filing and occasional office use.

Reliable Patented No.1 Mechanism: Equipped with a patented No.1 mechanism, these files provide exceptional locking force, guaranteeing precise closing even after 10,000 uses for long-lasting reliability.

Customizable & Easy Identification: Features replaceable spine pocket labels that allow for effortless customization and easy identification of contents, helping you maintain an organized filing system.
User-Friendly Design: Designed for convenience, these lever arch files include a comfortable finger ring for easy handling, making organization simple and efficient.
Package Contents: This set includes three lever arch files in Black, Red, and Blue, making it easy to color-code your documents. Suitable for A4 documents with standard 2-hole punching.
description: From the manufacturer Rexel Choices The right tools for the job have to look right too. Rexel Choices allows you to coordinate your desk stationery across our entire range of hole punches, staplers, files & folders and desk organisers. Co-ordinated office solutions Using top quality Rexel products there is no need to compromise quality to get the coordination you need to make your work environment look outstanding.
